hooks.command: "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/sync-to-platforms.sh && echo 'Harness Pipeline active. Use @planner, @executor, @reviewer subagents directly.'
echo 'Reminder: Harness pipeline mandatory for all module tasks. Read PROJECT.md. Config: .mcp.json (primary) → Kiro/Antigravity (sync)'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == .mcp.json ]] || [[ "$FILE" == .claude/settings* ]]; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/sync-to-platforms.sh; fi; if [[ "$FILE" == modules/* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == skills/* ]]; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/scripts/agents/kairos.sh "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
